--- Plasmoid — Bardic Musician's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Plasmoid — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Plasmoid — Bardic Musician.
→ Plasmoid — Bardic Musician healed for 6 HP. HP: 13/67

→ Plasmoid — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 7 vs DC 10]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 6 rounds ===
